text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I appear on a live TV program, and they even
prepared a special cake to celebrate my efforts...
But I'm not fit to be a princess! I don't deserve
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've acted like I was the only heroine and behaved
in a self-centered manner. I've hurt so many
people...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer promises to grow alongside me and
improve together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I'm sorry! I promise I won't be an
embarrassment of a princess anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Kinko Sho. I'll seal away my
princess special moves until everyone accepts
me...
